scripts.setup: npm install --ignore-scripts && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate:deploy
scripts.prisma:update: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate:deploy
scripts.prisma:update:dev: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:push && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.engine:selftest:all: npm run engine:selftest && npm run engine:selftest:proof && npm run engine:selftest:allocator && npm run engine:selftest:matrix && npm run engine:selftest:boundary && npm run engine:selftest:design-core && npm run engine:selftest:behavioral-matrix && npm run engine:selftest:phase33-matrix && npm run engine:selftest:phase34-routing && npm run engine:selftest:phase35-security && npm run engine:selftest:phase36-implementation && npm run engine:selftest:phase41-scenarios && npm run engine:selftest:phase42-templates && npm run engine:selftest:phase75-golden-requirements
scripts.prisma:baseline:existing: sh -c 'for d in prisma/migrations/*; do [ -d "$d" ] && npx prisma migrate resolve --applied "$(basename "$d")"; done'
scripts.engine:selftest:cidr-core: npm run engine:selftest && npm run engine:selftest:proof && npm run engine:selftest:allocator && npm run engine:selftest:boundary && npm run engine:selftest:design-core
